Home Scripts Sprites

Embeds

Name Description Tags Download
Lib Folder This is a 'master' lib folder, including files from many prominent members of the community. All scripts hosted here will be setup to use this lib. The base lib folder comes from: https://github.com/cmann1/DustScripts embeds Download
Module Folder Some scripts will use this folder. Folder comes from: https://github.com/cmann1/DustScripts Embeds Download

Templates

Name Description Tags Download
Script Template - Editor A template file to build your own scripts template Download
Script Template - Main A template file to build your own scripts template Download
Script Template - Main Alternate A template file to build your own scripts template Download
Script Template - Player A template file to build your own scripts template Download
Script Template - Pool A template file to build your own scripts template Download
Script Template - Queue A template file to build your own scripts template Download
Script Template - Subframe A template file to build your own scripts template Download
Script Template - Trigger A template file to build your own scripts template Download

Gameplay Scripts

Name Description Tags Download
Action Character Swap (No RNG) Swap character based on actions such as jumping and attacking. player, attack Download
Action Character Swap (RNG) Swap character based on actions such as jumping and attacking randomly. rng, attack Download
Air Charge Refresh Trigger Trigger refreshes air charge trigger, aircharge Download
Apple Goal Counter Set the number of apples to be hit to clear level apple, end-level Download
Apple Respawn Respawn one apple one time apple, respawn, trigger Download
Apple Spawner Trigger Trigger zone spawns apple as well as destroys apple. Can choose launch speed. Spawning an apple creates a flag, and destorying it deletes flag for completion reasons. apple, respawn, trigger, velocity Download
Apple Zone Destroys Tiles Declare an apple zone, as well a rectangular zone to be deleted when a tile is brought into it apple, trigger, clear-tiles Download
Arrow Simon Says Using a trigger, define Arrow directions and attack types to give back air charges. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/10132/simon-says aircharge, new-gameplay, attack Download
Avalanche Set props to be your avalanche as well as optional choices to embed sound files. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/12101/the-alps prop, sound Download
Baby Park Place down lap triggers causing lap counter to increment 1. NOTE: Lap counter is placed on HUD and does not line up with mouse movement in game world race, trigger Download
Background Gameplay Character appears in parallax background layers. Layer 15 is redrawn as the collision layers. Can use trigger to swap back to layer 19 visual, parallax, trigger Download
Balloon On Hit Grow bigger on hit of an entity. Can embed sound file. size-change, sound Download
Become Entity Become any enemy and gain their power! entity, new-gameplay Download
Blindfold Can't see anything other than HUD' blind, new-gameplay Download
Bounce Zone Create a bounce zone with a trigger trigger, bounce Download
Breakable Tiles Choose individual tiles to be broken upon hit clear-tiles, trigger, tiles Download
Breakable Wall Choose a zone to be broken upon hit. Can change the health of tiles clear-tiles, trigger, tiles Download
Change Attack Damage Changes attack damage of light and heavy attacks attack, health, damage Download
Character Swap Swap characters with taunt taunt, characters Download
Character Unlock Trigger Unlock characters by hitting a trigger zone. Swap character with taunt trigger, characters, taunt Download
Clear Room Teleport Clear a defined zone of dust and entities to teleport dust, entity, trigger Download
Clone Spawner Spawn a clone of the player clone, player Download
Clunk Enables clunk-like physics without needing to move the tiles clunk, new-gameplay Download
Combo Manager Gives control of combo loss conditions combo, player Download
Cross Beams Beam trigger is tied to player and will shoot at a modified delay. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/12941/crucifixion new-gameplay, laser Download
Ground Combo While touching the ground gain combo meter combo Download
Delayed Teleport Teleport trigger that activates after X number of frames teleport, trigger Download
Disable Anything Manager Create trigger zones to disable attacks, jumps, and individual movements. Can have each trigger activated once or multiple times trigger, attack, all Download
Dust Respawner Zone Dust will respawn in declared zone dust, trigger Download
Edge Toggle Distance Can disable edge collision or enable edge collision depending if player is in trigger zone trigger, tiles Download
End Zone Mystery Hard set coordinates in script. If player enters coordiantes end the level hard-coded, mystery Download
Enemies Don't Hurt Enemies can attack but do no damage entity Download
Enemy Health Controller Control the health of all enemies in a level entity, health, damage Download
Enemy Manager Control enemy health, move speed, and attack speed entity, health, damage, AI Download
Entity Follower Can link a child entity to follow a parent entity entity, follow, entity, AI Download
Entity Teleporter Trigger zone that can teleports an entity entity, teleporter, trigger Download
Fast Dashing, jumping and downdashing retains and increases speed, most friction has been removed, and there is no terminal velocity new-gameplay, speed-change Download
Final Tire Boss Turn a tire into a final boss! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/14296/revenge-of-pinata new-gameplay, entity, boss Download
Flywrench Create lasers that can only be passed while holding jump. White=Default, Red=Jump, Pink=Death. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/9388/ceres laser, new-gameplay Download
Forces Face Right Forces the player to face right at all times force-action, direction Download
Force Player Actions Force player to perform certain actions every actionable frame force-aciton Download
Gravity switcher Switches the player's gravity! Can also control fog color during switch trigger, gravity, fog Download
Hittable Zone Define an invisible zone that can be hit by the player. trigger Download
Hit an Apple Hit a single apple to clear the level apple, attack, end-level Download
Hit An Apple With An Apple Spawns an apple at the player. The player must hit an apple with another apple to end the level apple, attack, end-level Download
Ice Physics Create your own ice rink! ice, new-gameplay, physics Download
Ice Physics 2 Create your own ice rink...2! ice, new-gameplay, physics Download
Ice Zones Define a zone which affects player physics, creating simillar physics as to ice trigger, ice, new-gameplay, physics Download
Infinite Air Charges Gives the player infinite air charges aircharge Download
Infinite Super Gives the player infinite super super Download
Instant Actions Perform all actions instantly! new-gameplay, all Download
Invincible I'm... INVINCIBLE! health, invincible Download
Jump Character Swap Swap characters on every jump input jump, characters Download
Katamari Apple Collect all enemies with your apple to beat the level apple, new-gameplay, end-level Download
Kill X Apples Kill X apples to beat the level apple, end-level Download
Kingsbird Flight Fly like you do in Kingsbird! Hold light attack and down while falling to generate momentum physics, new-gameplay Download
Laser Use a trigger to create a laser source point. Kills player upon contact. Can use white lab tiles to bounce the laser, and lab glass tiles to allow it to pass through laser, trigger, visual Download
Lava Lava comes up from the bottom of the screen. Run! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/12807/escape visual, new-gameplay Download
Lights Off Turns off everything except the player visual, new-gameplay Download
Man-Girl Lock Force Man/Girl on your level. Man = Man/Worth Girl=Girl/Kid man-girl Download
Medium Speed Choose a capped speed the player can reach. Adds no friction speed-change, new-gameplay Download
Moon Trigger Removes all vertical velocity. Has a music embed that can play when trigger is hit. NOTE: Leave value set to 0 otherwise it won't work trigger, sound, physics Download
Multiplayer - Share Combo Share combo between all players in multiplayer multiplayer, combo Download
Multiplayer - Team Attack Hit your team in multiplayer multiplayer, attack Download
No Aircharge Removes all aircharges from the player aircharge Download
No Bob Removes all bob from floating enemies entity Download
No Clip Player can fall through all collision tiles new-gameplay Download
No Direction Removes any use of the directional inputs direction, new-gameplay Download
No Hitrise Removes hitrise when hitting enemies attack, physics Download
No Dust Spread Killed enemies no longer spread dust dust, attack, entity Download
Only Move Right Can only move right, no backtracking! direction, new-gameplay Download
Pacifist Clear all dust without attacking any entities to end the level dust, entity, new-gameplay Download
Player Shadow Chase Shadows that copy the exact movement of the player chase you. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/14379/old-site visual, new-gameplay, player Download
Player Wolf Become the Wolf. AWOOOOOO entity, new-gameplay Download
Pogo Bounce forever, can gain momentum through downdashing and speed transfering physics, new-gameplay Download
Porcupine Fire Speed Change the fire speed of porcupines entity, AI Download
Porcupines Off Turn off porcupines from attacking entity, AI Download
Prism Replacer - Slime Barrel Replace all prisms with slime barrels visual, entity Download
Redlight Greenlight Don't get caught moving while its red! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/14239/downtown visual, new-gameplay Download
Reducer Turn an enemy big with extra health! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/10189/reducer entity, health, attack, size-change Download
Remote Bomb Place a bomb with heavy attack and activate it to attack the area! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/10880/we-got-a-timebomb attack, visual, new-gameplay Download
Remove Enemy AI Turn off all enemy AI entity, AI Download
Reverse Coyote Jump If you jump too close to a ledge you won't get an aircharge meme, jump Download
Reverse Slopeboost You think you are going one way, but actually... boost, meme Download
Shy Blocks Declare 'shy zones'. Tiles in these zones will disappear when the player looks at them new-gameplay, tiles, trigger Download
Single Ground Dash Can only dash one time on the ground. Can be refreshed by jumping new-gameplay Download
Slow Set maximum player speed speed Download
Someone Wins ID is hard coded into the file. Allows a trigger zone of tiles to disappear if matching ID plays the level. meme, hard-coded, clear-tiles Download
Speed Check Checks if the player has the matching units to pass through trigger speed, triggers, new-gameplay Download
Speed Boost Zone Gives the player a boost to their X Y within a given trigger. Boost is dash activated and the player must be facing right. trigger, direction, boost Download
Start Speed Gives an initial boost of XY speed off of 3,2,1 countdown boost Download
Sticky Totems Other entities stick to moving totems entity, sticky Download
Stoneboss Boss Stoneboss' final form entity, boss Download
Sticky Ground Force the player to move by jumping or dashing off walls. The ground is sticky! sticky, new-gameplay Download
Super Killer Kills the player if they haver have super super Download
Super Only All attacks become super attack, super, new-gameplay Download
Taunt Checkpoint Create a player-made checkpoint with Taunt tuant, checkpoint Download
Taunt Invincibility Become invincible by using Taunt! taunt, invincible Download
Taunt Noclip Activate Noclip with Taunt taunt, tiles Download
Taunt Respawn Teleport to the start of the level carrying any momentum taunt Download
Taunt Size Changer Use Taunt to grow bigger and use Taunt+Down to grow smaller taunt, size-change Download
Totem Spam Ledgecancel Get totem spammed if you ledge cancel entity, ledge-cancel Download
Treadmill Auto-pushes the player to the right as long as y=0 direction Download
Waves Shoot waves of power from your attacks! new-gameplay, attack Download

Visual Scripts

Name Description Tags Download
Apple Replace Replace the apple sprite with a custom image apple, custom-image, sprite Download
Blink Cause the set layer to swap between two colors fog, shift Download
Blurry Force the entire screen to be blurry blurry Download
Camera Wobble Force the camera to wobble back and forth camera, camera-move Download
Change Dustspread Change the dustspread in the level to any of the other filth types dust Download
City Clock Create a real-time clock out of city props prop, clock Download
Corpse Knockback Have the corpse of the enemy kill go flying! attack, entity Download
Create Glass Define a region to be a act similar to a pane of glass. No reflection blurry Download
Custom Images Put custom images into your level custom-image, trigger Download
Custom Props Put custom props into your level custom-image, prop, trigger Download
Dust Type Changes dustspread but also changes all the dust in a given radius to a certain filth type dust, attack Download
Enemy Cars Turns all enemies into cars. Works best with totems custom-image, sprite, entity, sound Download
Fog Shift Shift the hue colors of the selected layer fog, shift Download
Follow Player Camera Have the player always in the center of the camera camera, camera-move, player Download
Gears & Prism Gears Spawn moving gears, but also provide visual gears behind prisms! motion, prop, entity, art Download
HUD Text Put text anywhere on the HUD hud, text Download
Layer Controller Shift the draw order of layers layers, fog, draw-order Download
Layer Dustblocks Put dustblocks on different layers. Useful for fog issues layers, draw-order, dust Download
Layer Hider Hide one layer from being drawn layers, draw-order Download
Letter Box Create a dramatic movie with this script! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/14378/training-facility hud, art Download
Lookahead Allows the player to view the upcoming level. Use TAUNT and directional input to activate camera, taunt Download
Minimap Draws a real-time minimap. Set different colors for apples and entities hud, tiles, entity, apple Download
No HUD Removes the HUD during gameplay hud Download
Panning Camera Pan the camera between two different spots. Can change the speed of the pan. camera, camera-move Download
Parallax Layer Movement Parllax layers constantly shift parallax, layers, motion Download
Penis NSFW - Spawns a Penis made from pops and emitters. Download
Perspective Change Trigger Create a trigger that rotates the perspective of the camera within 360 degrees. camera, camera-move, motion Download
Player Backflip Backflip when going over ledges. RADICAL! raidcal, player Download
Player Emitter Change the 'King Zone Red' emittter particles to change player particles. NOTE: Keep value set to 4 otherwise expect lag. emitter, player Download
Positional Fog Have fog triggers activate based on player position rather than camera position fog, trigger, camera Download
Prism Replace Replace prisms with any image. Needs Embeds. custom-image, sprite Download
Prop Wind Blow props in the wind! prop, emitter, wind Download
Prop Scrolling Define a region that props will scroll and wrap around prop, motion Download
Rainbow Stream Use a trigger to create a rainbow stream! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/8584/rainbow-rush trigger, art Download
Remote Force Camera Force the player onto a specific camera line when they enter the trigger zone trigger, camera Download
Remove Cleansed Animals Removes the animal entities after killing a dusted enemy entity, attack Download
Shadows Has raycasting along tile edges replicating line of sight. fog, layers Download
Shadows No Raycast No raycasting on tile edges. Can modify Alpha value. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/12173/ruined-chambers fog, layers Download
Shake Trigger Causes screen to shake while player is in trigger trigger, motion Download
Spin Custom Image Spin that custom image! custom-image, sprite, motion Download
Spotlight A spotlight that can move back and forth prop, motion Download
Tentacales Create some spooky tentacles with triggers trigger, motion, art Download
Totem Replace Replace totem sprite with custom sprite custom-image, sprite Download
Triangles Create decorative triangles on layer 13 layers, art Download
Wobble Camera Wobbles the camera back and forth while in trigger zone. Keeps orientation when leaving trigger camera, camera-move Download
Entity Outliner Outline all entites as well as modify the outline scale art, player, entity, layers Download
Hat - Bunny Ears Give Dustman some Bunny Ears! art, hat, player Download
Hat - Custom Wear any type of hat you want! art, hat, player Download
Hat - Santa Hat Give Dustman a Santa Hat! art, hat, player Download
Seamless Use a seamless texture to create a seamlss background! Can modify alpha value. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/13090/cyclone art, layers Download
Time Of Day Fog Modify the fog trigger in a level according to the players system clock fog, clock Download

Audio Scripts

Name Description Tags Download
Custom Music Add custom music to your level music Download
Enemy Death Sound Play a custom sound when an enemy dies entity, sound Download
Metronome Spawn a metronome sound trigger at an X,Y location. No embeds needed sound, trigger Download
Multiple Custom Music Triggers Embed mulitple custom songs and tie their playing to triggers music, trigger Download
One-time Audio Play a custom audio file one time sound, trigger Download

Tool Scripts

Name Description Tags Download
Auto-jorf Helper Makes jorfs easy tool, jorf Download
Checkpoint Splits Provides in-game splits functionality with checkpoints tool, plugin, checkpoint Download
Collision Rays Shows when player is colliding with a surface tool, collision, visual Download
Create Information Log Generates a list of statistics every frame to console tool, console, information Download
Generate Entity Information Generate a list of entity information to console tool, console, information Download
Filth Projections More advanced filth projections then built-in dustmod version tool, visual Download
Fog Trigger Helper Quickly create basic fog triggers tool, fog, visual, trigger, editor Download
Force Camera Path When player enters trigger zone, force player to specific camera path tool, camera, editor, trigger Download
Free Tera Aligns player making teras 'free' tool, tera, trigger Download
Internal Clock Checker Checks the difference between internal game clock and real time. Prints to console tool, console, information, clock Download
Jump Fix On Editor Respawn Gives you an extra aircharge after using editor anywhere tool, editor, respawn Download
Key Door Helper Gives a visual representation of how keys and doors are linked tool, visual, keydoor Download
Ledge Cancel Tracker Plugin Check frames spent in hover during a ledge cancel tool, plugin, ledge-cancel Download
Legacy Low Percent Plugin Due to change in low% behavior, this recreates deathwarp abuse and ending attack abuse plugin, low-percent, dust Download
Map Utilities Mass modify levels by quickly changing tiles, filth, or other features tool, editor, trigger Download
On Hurt Tie an event to when an enemy strikes the player tool, event, trigger Download
Print Time Prints time to console tool, clock, console Download
Prop ID Checker Declare a set region and print all prop IDs to console tool, console, prop Download
Prop Path Place curved props as well as randomize prop motion tool, prop, editor Download
Temporary Spawn Use 'F' to place a temporary spawn, 'ALT+F' to delete tool, editor, respawn Download
Tera Drop Calculator Find how wide a tera is. Use Jump & Taunt to activate the test. Output is printed to console tool, tera, console Download
Trigger Time Change Music & Ambience trigger by a numerical value, rather than a slider tool, trigger, editor, music, sound Download
Twirlie Trainer Provides a visual representation on the timing of twirlies tool, visual, twirly Download

Editor Scripts

Name Description Tags Download
Camera Area Path Viewer View the actual area the camera shows in editor tool, camera, editor, visual Download
Default Trigger Plugin Select ANY trigger and use N to save it. Now you can use N to 'reclick' the trigger at any point editor, plugin, trigger Download
ID Entity & Trigger Inspector Plugin Provides the ID when hovering over an entity or trigger in editor tool, plugin, editor Download
Ruler Plugin Use 'A' to measure the distance between blocks. Use 'M' to give coordinates tool, plugin, information, editor Download
Advance Tools Advance Editor Features. Find up to date and compiled version here: https://github.com/cmann1/adv-tools plugin, editor, prop, visual Download
Dust Tracker 2 Plugin Track dust in the level including entities. Helpful for hard to see, or obscure dust tool, plugin, dust, information, visual, replay Download

Major Gameplay Overhaul Scripts

Name Description Tags Download
Bastion Stairs Climb the staircase! Use JUMP to proceed and DASH to switch directions. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/11030/bastion-stairs new-gameplay Download
Cassette Jump between platforms in rhythm like the cassette challenges in Celeste! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/10979/cassette-tape new-gameplay Download
Crimson Boss Based off the boss from I Wanna Kill the Kamilia 2. Must embed files. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/12640/crimson-boss new-gameplay Download
Golf Time to prove your worth on the golf course! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/11440/par-time-duster new-gameplay Download
Labyrinth I hope your maze find skills are polished! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/11477/labyrinth new-gameplay, mystery Download
Marble Roll (Demo) A physics demonstration of 3D Marble movement new-gameplay Download
Multiplayer - Air Hockey Grab a friend and play air hockey! Mouse controls. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/12775/air-hockey new-gameplay, mouse, multiplayer Download
Multiplayer - Battleship You need two to sink some ships. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/11539/event-horizon new-gameplay, mouse, multiplayer Download
Pong A good test of any game's capabilities is if you can play Pong new-gameplay Download
Reaction Test Finish the level by reacting to the commands on screen! new-gameplay Download
Scrabble Description for 16 points. Need to embed a world list 'words.txt' new-gameplay, mouse Download

Major Gameplay Overhaul Packages

Name Description Tags Download
100m Freestyle Dustforce has never looked this good. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/12531/100m-freestyle new-gameplay Download
3D Dustforce now in 3D!! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/13258/protodimensionetics new-gameplay Download
Batman They think I'm hiding in the shadows, but I am the shadows plugin, new-gameplay Download
Canyon Plane Shooter 3D Place Combat new-gameplay, mouse Download
Chaos Only for the brave. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/12427/the-lab-chaos new-gameplay Download
Chess 400 Elo or bust new-gameplay, mouse Download
Dusters Rift What is dustforce was a MOBA? new-gameplay, mouse Download
Helping Hands This plugin adds the latest in janitorial accessories! plugin, multiplayer Download
Knighthall Simulator Dustman is causing trouble again. Defend your home! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/9262/knight-hall-simulator new-gameplay Download
Multiplayer - Hot Potato Play hot potato with this plugin! new-gameplay, multiplayer Download
Pokermans Got to catch them all in this plugin! See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/12747/pokeballs new-gameplay Download
PRNG Create pseduorandom levels. Define pre-made level chunks and combine them together. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/10820/dustforce-arcade new-gameplay, rng Download
Rhythm Force My years of DDR training has made me ready for this. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/11937/rhythmforce-shoot-em-up new-gameplay Download
Rifle Big laser = big fun. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/11174/weapons-facility laser, new-gameplay Download
Rope Dart Use TAUNT to throw the dart and travel as high speeds towards walls. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/9527/way-of-the-ninja new-gameplay Download
Shooter Man Dustforce but with guns new-gameplay Download
Super Meat Boy Is Dustforce just game engine at this point? See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/10361/blood-trail new-gameplay Download
Multiplayer - Survival Balance Patch A multiplayer survival mode balance patch. new-gameplay, multiplayer Download
Target Test Break the targets. See: https://atlas.dustforce.com/9910/target-test new-gameplay Download
Created and maintained by Miles, and hosted on GitHub.
